caption: A series of informational slides are presented against a teal background. The first scene features a group of five students, four of whom are gathered around two laptops on a table in a classroom setting, while a fifth student stands nearby. To the left of this image, text reads, "¿Cómo pueden contribuir las plataformas REA a la disposi". The next scene shifts focus to the right side of the screen with a logo for "procomún" and the question, "¿Cómo veis el futuro de los recursos educati". The following scene introduces a graphic titled "Recursos Educativos Digitales" containing various logos and links, accompanied by the text, "¿Qué portales de REA tenemos a nuestra disposición? ¿Qué mejoraríais de ellos?". The final scene concludes with a simple centered statement in all capital letters: "DE TODO ESTO HABLAREM".
